name: Streaming Plan Recovery
task: Detect when the user's observed trajectory is diverging from their intended plan, and produce a timely intervention that helps them recover.

records.title: POV : Breakfast Shift Turned Into a Full Rush 🍔🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.current_state: One egg has been cracked into the pan, and the pan is being moved away.
verifier.expected_next_state: Crack two more eggs into the pan.
verifier.visual_evidence: The user cracks one egg into a pan, then picks up the pan and moves away briefly, only to return and crack two more eggs into the same pan.
verifier.assistant_response: You need two more eggs for this dish.

curation.visual_evidence: The user cracks one egg into a pan, then picks up the pan and moves away briefly, only to return and crack two more eggs into the same pan.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.current_state: One egg has been cracked into the pan, and the pan is being moved away.
annotation.expected_next_state: Crack two more eggs into the pan.
annotation.assistant_response: You need two more eggs for this dish.

records.title: POV : Real Kitchen Pressure | Omelettes, Wraps & Rush Hour 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.current_state: The salad bowl contains lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and a hard-boiled egg.
verifier.expected_next_state: Add dressing or other salad-specific toppings, or serve the salad.
verifier.visual_evidence: The user opens a drawer containing sandwich meats and cheeses and inspects them, which is not relevant to the current salad preparation.
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you're preparing a salad. Are you looking for a specific topping? Those meats are typically for sandwiches.

curation.visual_evidence: The user opens a drawer containing sandwich meats and cheeses and inspects them, which is not relevant to the current salad preparation.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.current_state: The salad bowl contains lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and a hard-boiled egg.
annotation.expected_next_state: Add dressing or other salad-specific toppings, or serve the salad.
annotation.assistant_response: It looks like you're preparing a salad. Are you looking for a specific topping? Those meats are typically for sandwiches.

records.title: POV : The Breakfast Rush Never Stopped 😳🍳
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare a breakfast order consisting of an English Muffin Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich, French Fries, and Pancakes.
verifier.current_state: The user has cracked one egg into a frying pan for the English Muffin sandwich and is cracking a second egg into the same pan.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should have stopped after cracking one egg for the English Muffin sandwich, as the order only requires one egg for that item.
verifier.visual_evidence: The order ticket (visible at 0:31) specifies '1x #5 English Muffin Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich'. The user cracks a first egg into the pan at 1:08 and then a second egg into the same pan at 1:22.
verifier.assistant_response: The order only calls for one egg for the English Muffin sandwich.

curation.visual_evidence: The order ticket (visible at 0:31) specifies '1x #5 English Muffin Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich'. The user cracks a first egg into the pan at 1:08 and then a second egg into the same pan at 1:22.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare a breakfast order consisting of an English Muffin Sausage, Egg and Cheese Sandwich, French Fries, and Pancakes.
annotation.current_state: The user has cracked one egg into a frying pan for the English Muffin sandwich and is cracking a second egg into the same pan.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should have stopped after cracking one egg for the English Muffin sandwich, as the order only requires one egg for that item.
annotation.assistant_response: The order only calls for one egg for the English Muffin sandwich.

records.title: 👉 POV : Nonstop Grill Shift & Fresh Chicken Salads 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare breakfast items including pancakes and French toast.
verifier.current_state: The user has placed pancake batter on the griddle and is now preparing bread for French toast.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should attend to the cooking pancakes, such as flipping them or removing them from the griddle, before starting to prepare the French toast.
verifier.visual_evidence: The user places pancake batter on the griddle at 0:03-0:06. They then walk away from the griddle at 0:06 and start preparing bread for French toast from 0:17. The pancakes are left unattended on the griddle while the user prepares and cooks French toast from 0:55 onwards.
verifier.assistant_response: The pancakes are still on the griddle. You might want to check on them before they burn.

curation.visual_evidence: The user places pancake batter on the griddle at 0:03-0:06. They then walk away from the griddle at 0:06 and start preparing bread for French toast from 0:17. The pancakes are left unattended on the griddle while the user prepares and cooks French toast from 0:55 onwards.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare breakfast items including pancakes and French toast.
annotation.current_state: The user has placed pancake batter on the griddle and is now preparing bread for French toast.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should attend to the cooking pancakes, such as flipping them or removing them from the griddle, before starting to prepare the French toast.
annotation.assistant_response: The pancakes are still on the griddle. You might want to check on them before they burn.

records.title: POV : 👉 Busy Grill Shift with Kebabs & Omelettes 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare an omelet and hash browns.
verifier.current_state: The user has one omelet and hash browns cooking on the griddle. They have just prepared the ingredients for a second omelet.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should continue cooking the first omelet and hash browns, ensuring they are properly cooked and flipped/moved as needed, before starting a new omelet.
verifier.visual_evidence: The first omelet is visible on the left side of the griddle, still cooking. The hash browns are on the right, also cooking. The user is holding a bowl with the second omelet mixture, about to pour it onto the griddle, which has limited space.
verifier.assistant_response: The griddle is currently full with the first omelet and hash browns. Let's finish cooking those before starting another omelet.

curation.visual_evidence: The first omelet is visible on the left side of the griddle, still cooking. The hash browns are on the right, also cooking. The user is holding a bowl with the second omelet mixture, about to pour it onto the griddle, which has limited space.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare an omelet and hash browns.
annotation.current_state: The user has one omelet and hash browns cooking on the griddle. They have just prepared the ingredients for a second omelet.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should continue cooking the first omelet and hash browns, ensuring they are properly cooked and flipped/moved as needed, before starting a new omelet.
annotation.assistant_response: The griddle is currently full with the first omelet and hash browns. Let's finish cooking those before starting another omelet.

records.title: POV : 👉 Steady Grill Shift with Wraps, Kebabs & Omelettes 🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare a '1 meat omelet' with bacon, scrambled, and American cheese based on the order ticket.
verifier.current_state: The user is adding chopped vegetables (green peppers, onions, tomatoes, mushrooms) to a plate after having already placed bacon on the griddle.
verifier.expected_next_state: The user should prepare the eggs for the omelet and combine them with the bacon and American cheese, without adding any vegetables, as the order ticket specifies a 'meat omelet' and does not list any vegetables.
verifier.visual_evidence: The order ticket at 0:19-0:21 clearly states '1-3 MEAT OMELET' and 'BACON 1', with no mention of vegetables. The user proceeds to add green peppers (1:09), onions (1:12), tomatoes (1:14), and mushrooms (1:17) to a plate, and then adds these vegetables to the griddle at 1:23-1:29.
verifier.assistant_response: The order ticket for the meat omelet only specifies bacon and American cheese. It does not include any vegetables.

curation.visual_evidence: The order ticket at 0:19-0:21 clearly states '1-3 MEAT OMELET' and 'BACON 1', with no mention of vegetables. The user proceeds to add green peppers (1:09), onions (1:12), tomatoes (1:14), and mushrooms (1:17) to a plate, and then adds these vegetables to the griddle at 1:23-1:29.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.

annotation.goal: Prepare a '1 meat omelet' with bacon, scrambled, and American cheese based on the order ticket.
annotation.current_state: The user is adding chopped vegetables (green peppers, onions, tomatoes, mushrooms) to a plate after having already placed bacon on the griddle.
annotation.expected_next_state: The user should prepare the eggs for the omelet and combine them with the bacon and American cheese, without adding any vegetables, as the order ticket specifies a 'meat omelet' and does not list any vegetables.
annotation.assistant_response: The order ticket for the meat omelet only specifies bacon and American cheese. It does not include any vegetables.

records.title: POV : 👉 Grill Didn’t Stop… My Friend Had to Jump In 😳🔥
records.best_use: Human or VLM verification of a visible plan-deviation moment.

verifier.goal: Prepare an omelet and hash browns
verifier.current_state: The omelet mixture is on the griddle, and hash browns are already cooking on the griddle.
verifier.expected_next_state: Continue cooking the omelet and the existing hash browns.
verifier.visual_evidence: The person picks up a raw potato and a knife, indicating they are about to prepare hash browns from scratch, despite already having hash browns cooking on the griddle.
verifier.assistant_response: It looks like you already have hash browns cooking on the griddle. Do you need to prepare more?

curation.visual_evidence: The person picks up a raw potato and a knife, indicating they are about to prepare hash browns from scratch, despite already having hash browns cooking on the griddle.
curation.notes: Auto-collected from channel feed; VLM must verify.
